crypto_eth15m_midband.note: Widened from PF-sweep bands ([0.25-0.35]/[0.65-0.70]) which produced 0 live trades in 3.5h. Skip <0.15 NO and >0.85 YES (bad R/R) but accept the 0.15-0.35 / 0.60-0.80 middle band where markets actually trade.

crypto_eth_hourly_midband.note: Slightly widened NO band lower bound. KXETH calibration showed YES has no edge — keeping NO-only.

crypto_sol15m_midband.note: Widened YES upper from 0.75 to 0.80 — still skips the bad-R/R 0.80-0.90 zone.

crypto_btcd_midband.note: NO side -$96.39 over 23 trades, 60.9% WR vs 76% implied. Calibration was 15m-market data; doesn't transfer to BTC daily markets. YES side keeps trading (88% WR, +$61.60 lifetime). Re-enable after fresh BTC-daily backtest confirms a real NO edge.

crypto_btc15m_midband.note: Upper YES (80-85c) lost -$25.62 over 6 trades, 66.7% WR vs 83% implied. Calibration is 2 months old; trim to 75-80c only until re-validated. NO band unchanged (4/4 wins lifetime).
